title: trifolium maritimum subsp. xatardii
intro: Trifolium maritimum subsp. xatardii is a subspecies of the sea clover plant, a type of legume that belongs to the Fabaceae family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments such as digestive issues and skin problems due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Trifolium maritimum subsp. xatardii include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant can be consumed as a tea, or its leaves and roots can be used to make infusions or decoctions, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
